tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated creatinine, proteinuria, and low urine specific gravity, suggesting impaired renal function. Urine findings (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal odor, bilirubin, ketones, and glucosuria) further support renal and possible hepatic involvement. Hemoglobin A1c is unexpectedly low despite glucosuria, which may indicate recent onset or fluctuating glucose levels. No evidence of urinary tract infection. Recommend further nephrological and metabolic evaluation.

display.value: Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
